name: SAP Litmos LMS API
what_it_does: SAP Litmos REST API for cloud-based learning management system. Enables AI agents to manage learner and team provisioning and administration, handle course assignment and enrollment automation, access learning completion and certification tracking, retrieve compliance training management and deadline monitoring, manage content upload and course catalog administration, handle assessment and quiz result data, access learning analytics and progress reporting, retrieve instructor-led training (ILT) scheduling data, manage gamification and learning point data, and integrate learning data with HR systems, CRMs, and customer success platforms for extended enterprise training.
use_cases: Automating customer and partner training enrollment from success automation agents
Tracking compliance training completion from HR compliance agents
Managing employee onboarding training from HR onboarding agents
Integrating learning data with Salesforce from customer success agents
not_for: Complex talent management beyond LMS scope without SAP SuccessFactors
AI-driven adaptive learning without pre-built content catalog needs
Enterprise learning with complex succession and performance management
best_when: A company using SAP Litmos wants AI agents to automate learner provisioning, course enrollment, compliance tracking, certification management, and learning data integration with CRM or HR systems.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated compliance training enrollment must respect regulatory deadlines and ensure 100% completion tracking accuracy. Customer and partner training automation must handle user provisioning correctly to prevent unauthorized content access.

auth.notes: SAP Litmos uses API key authentication. Account-level API key in request header. REST API documentation in Litmos help center. Webhooks for completion and enrollment events. Salesforce integration native. SCORM and xAPI for content. Account subdomain required in all API calls.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per active user monthly pricing
pricing.notes: Dublin, Ireland. SAP subsidiary. Originally CallidusCloud (acquired by SAP 2018). Strong customer and partner training (extended enterprise) use case. Native Salesforce integration. 30M+ learners. Strong compliance training for financial services and healthcare. Competes with Docebo and TalentLMS for cloud LMS market.

performance.rate_limits: 200 API calls per minute per API key

known_agent_gotchas: Account subdomain required — all API URLs include account subdomain; hardcode or store separately from API key
API key only — no OAuth or granular scopes; single key with full account access
Rate limit documented (200/min) — implement request throttling to stay within limit
No public MCP server — API key REST API via help center documentation
Extended enterprise provisioning — customer/partner learner accounts require careful user lifecycle management
Content access control — course visibility depends on team membership; verify team assignment before enrollment
agent_readiness.security_notes: LMS and learning data. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key. US/EU/AU. Learner completion and certification data.

security_score_components.security_notes: LMS learning data. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key. US/EU/AU. Learner progress and compliance training data.
